# Teamwork Connector - Full Documentation

# Teamwork Connector 0.1.0

> For the full documentation index, see: https://docs.mulesoft.com/llms.txt

Anypoint Connector for Teamwork (Teamwork Connector) enables Mule applications to access the
Teamwork API.

> [!NOTE] Teamwork Connector is a beta connector that is subject to the Beta Services Terms at
> [Agreements - Salesforce.com](https://www.salesforce.com/company/legal/) or a written Unified
> Pilot Agreement if executed by Customer, and the Non-GA Gen AI and Non-GA Credit Consumption terms
> in the
> [Product Terms Directory](https://ptd.salesforce.com/?_ga=2.247987783.1372150065.1709219475-629000709.1639001992).
> Use of this beta connector with external systems or services consumes
> [Mule messages](../../general/usage-metrics) and is at the Customerâs sole discretion.

For information about compatibility and fixed issues, refer to the Teamwork Connector Release Notes.

## Before You Begin

To use this connector, you must be familiar with:

- The Teamwork Connectorâs API
- Anypoint Connectors
- Mule runtime engine (Mule)
- Elements and global elements in a Mule flow
- How to create a Mule app using Anypoint Code Builder or Anypoint Studio

Before creating an app, you must have:

- Credentials to access the Teamwork target resource
- Anypoint Platform
- The latest versions of Anypoint Code Builder or Anypoint Studio

## Next Step

After you complete the prerequisites, youâre ready to create an app and configure the connector
using [Anypoint Studio](../../connectors/introduction/intro-config-use-studio) or
[Anypoint Code Builder](../../connectors/introduction/intro-config-use-acb).

## See Also

- [Introduction to Anypoint Connectors](../../connectors/introduction/introduction-to-anypoint-connectors)
- [Use Exchange to Discover Connectors, Templates, and Examples](../../connectors/introduction/intro-use-exchange)
- [Teamwork Connector Reference](teamwork-connector-reference)
- [Salesforce Help](https://help.salesforce.com)
---

# Teamwork Connector 0.1.0 Reference

> For the full documentation index, see: https://docs.mulesoft.com/llms.txt

## Configurations

---

### Config

Default configuration.

#### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Name</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name for this configuration. Connectors reference the configuration with this name.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Connection</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#Config_BasicAuth">Basic Auth</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>The connection types to provide to this configuration.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Name</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The identifier of this element used to reference it in other components.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Expiration Policy</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#ExpirationPolicy">Expiration Policy</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Configures the minimum amount of time that a dynamic configuration instance can remain idle before Mule considers it eligible for expiration. This does not mean that the platform expires the instance at the exact moment that it becomes eligible. Mule purges the instances as appropriate.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

#### Connection Types

##### Basic Auth

###### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>baseUri</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The base URI for the Teamwork API.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>password</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The password to authenticate the requests.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>username</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>The username to authenticate the requests.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>TLS Configuration</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#Tls">TLS</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>The TLS configuration for secure connections.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Reconnection</p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#reconnection">Reconnection</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>When the application is deployed, a connectivity test is performed on all connectors. If set to true, deployment fails if the test doesnât pass after exhausting the associated reconnection strategy.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

## Supported Operations

- [createTimer](#CreateTimer)
- [deleteTimer](#DeleteTimer)
- [getAllProjectUpdates](#GetAllProjectUpdates)
- [getAllTasklists](#GetAllTasklists)
- [getAllTimeEntries](#GetAllTimeEntries)
- [getAllocationTimeEntries](#GetAllocationTimeEntries)
- [getProjectById](#GetProjectById)
- [getProjectTasklists](#GetProjectTasklists)
- [getProjects](#GetProjects)
- [getTasklistById](#GetTasklistById)

## Operations

## createTimer

`<teamwork:create-timer>`

Creates a timer entry in Teamwork.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The request body content.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- TEAMWORK:BAD_REQUEST
- TEAMWORK:CLIENT_ERROR
- TEAMWORK:CONNECTIVITY
- TEAMWORK:FORBIDDEN
- TEAMWORK:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- TEAMWORK:SECURITY
- TEAMWORK:SERVER_ERROR
- TEAMWORK:TIMEOUT
- TEAMWORK:UNAUTHORIZED

## deleteTimer

`<teamwork:delete-timer>`

Deletes a timer entry in Teamwork.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>timerId</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID of the timer to delete.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>body</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td><td><p>The request body content.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Null</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- TEAMWORK:BAD_REQUEST
- TEAMWORK:CLIENT_ERROR
- TEAMWORK:CONNECTIVITY
- TEAMWORK:FORBIDDEN
- TEAMWORK:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- TEAMWORK:NOT_FOUND
- TEAMWORK:SECURITY
- TEAMWORK:SERVER_ERROR
- TEAMWORK:TIMEOUT
- TEAMWORK:UNAUTHORIZED

## getAllProjectUpdates

`<teamwork:get-all-project-updates>`

Retrieves all project updates from Teamwork.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>updatedAfter</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter project updates updated after this date.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>projectStatus</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by project status.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>orderMode</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>asc</p></li><li><p>desc</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Sort order mode.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>orderBy</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>date</p></li><li><p>color</p></li><li><p>health</p></li><li><p>project</p></li><li><p>user</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Field to sort by.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>createdAfter</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter project updates created after this date.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>projectId</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by project ID.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>pageSize</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Number of results per page.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>page</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Page number to retrieve.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>skipCounts</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Skip count calculations.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>showDeleted</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Include deleted items in results.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>reactions</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Include reactions in results.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>onlyStarredProjects</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Return only starred projects.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>matchAllProjectTags</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Match all project tags.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>includeArchivedProjects</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Include archived projects in results.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>emoji</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Include emoji in results.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>activeOnly</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Return only active projects.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>projectTagIds</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by project tag IDs.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>projectStatuses</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by project statuses.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>projectOwnerIds</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by project owner IDs.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>projectHealths</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by project health levels.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>projectCompanyIds</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by project company IDs.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>projectCategoryIds</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by project category IDs.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>include</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Fields to include in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>fields[users]</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><p>User fields to include in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>fields[projects]</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Project fields to include in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>fields[projectUpdates]</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Project update fields to include in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- TEAMWORK:CLIENT_ERROR
- TEAMWORK:CONNECTIVITY
- TEAMWORK:FORBIDDEN
- TEAMWORK:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- TEAMWORK:NOT_FOUND
- TEAMWORK:SECURITY
- TEAMWORK:SERVER_ERROR
- TEAMWORK:TIMEOUT
- TEAMWORK:UNAUTHORIZED

## getAllTasklists

`<teamwork:get-all-tasklists>`

Retrieves all task lists from Teamwork.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>page</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Page number to retrieve.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>pageSize</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Number of results per page.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- TEAMWORK:CLIENT_ERROR
- TEAMWORK:CONNECTIVITY
- TEAMWORK:FORBIDDEN
- TEAMWORK:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- TEAMWORK:SECURITY
- TEAMWORK:SERVER_ERROR
- TEAMWORK:TIMEOUT
- TEAMWORK:UNAUTHORIZED

## getAllTimeEntries

`<teamwork:get-all-time-entries>`

Retrieves all time entries from Teamwork.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>page</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Page number to retrieve.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>pageSize</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Number of results per page.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>updatedAfter</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter time entries updated after this date.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>startDate</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter time entries from this start date.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>endDate</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter time entries until this end date.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>deletedAfter</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter time entries deleted after this date.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>reportFormat</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Format for the report output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>projectStatus</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>active</p></li><li><p>current</p></li><li><p>late</p></li><li><p>upcoming</p></li><li><p>completed</p></li><li><p>deleted</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by project status.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>orderMode</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>asc</p></li><li><p>desc</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Sort order mode.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>orderBy</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>company</p></li><li><p>date</p></li><li><p>dateupdated</p></li><li><p>project</p></li><li><p>task</p></li><li><p>tasklist</p></li><li><p>user</p></li><li><p>description</p></li><li><p>billed</p></li><li><p>billable</p></li><li><p>timespent</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Field to sort by.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>invoicedType</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>all</p></li><li><p>invoiced</p></li><li><p>noninvoiced</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by invoiced status.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>billableType</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>all</p></li><li><p>billable</p></li><li><p>non-billable</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by billable status.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>updatedBy</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by user ID who updated the entry.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>ticketId</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by ticket ID.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>tasklistId</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by task list ID.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>invoiceId</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by invoice ID.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>budgetId</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by budget ID.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>allocationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by allocation ID.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>useFallbackMethod</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Use fallback method for retrieval.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>unattachedTimelogs</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Include unattached time logs.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>skipCounts</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Skip count calculations.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>showDeleted</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Include deleted items in results.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>returnCostInfo</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Include cost information in response.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>returnBillableInfo</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Include billable information in response.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>onlyStarredProjects</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Return only starred projects.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>matchAllTaskTags</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Match all task tags.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>matchAllTags</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Match all tags.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>matchAllProjectTags</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Match all project tags.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>isReportDownload</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Return results as a report download.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>includeTotals</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Include totals in response.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>includePermissions</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Include permissions in response.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>includeDescendants</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Include descendant items.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>includeArchivedProjects</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Include archived projects in results.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>deletedOnly</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Return only deleted items.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>taskTagIds</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by task tag IDs.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>taskStatuses</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by task statuses.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>taskIds</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by task IDs.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>tagIds</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by tag IDs.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>selectedColumns</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Columns to include in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>projectTagIds</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by project tag IDs.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>projectStatuses</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by project statuses.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>projectOwnerIds</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by project owner IDs.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>projectIds</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by project IDs.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>projectHealths</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by project health levels.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>projectCompanyIds</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by project company IDs.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>projectCategoryIds</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by project category IDs.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>include</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Fields to include in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>ids</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by specific time entry IDs.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>assignedToUserIds</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by assigned user IDs.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>assignedToTeamIds</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by assigned team IDs.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>assignedToCompanyIds</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by assigned company IDs.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>assignedTeamIds</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by team IDs.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- TEAMWORK:CLIENT_ERROR
- TEAMWORK:CONNECTIVITY
- TEAMWORK:FORBIDDEN
- TEAMWORK:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- TEAMWORK:SECURITY
- TEAMWORK:SERVER_ERROR
- TEAMWORK:TIMEOUT
- TEAMWORK:UNAUTHORIZED

## getAllocationTimeEntries

`<teamwork:get-allocation-time-entries>`

Retrieves time entries for a specific allocation from Teamwork.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>allocationId</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID of the allocation to retrieve time entries for.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>page</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Page number to retrieve.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>pageSize</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Number of results per page.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- TEAMWORK:CLIENT_ERROR
- TEAMWORK:CONNECTIVITY
- TEAMWORK:FORBIDDEN
- TEAMWORK:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- TEAMWORK:NOT_FOUND
- TEAMWORK:SECURITY
- TEAMWORK:SERVER_ERROR
- TEAMWORK:TIMEOUT
- TEAMWORK:UNAUTHORIZED

## getProjectById

`<teamwork:get-project-by-id>`

Retrieves a project by ID from Teamwork.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>projectId</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID of the project to retrieve.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>updatedAfter</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter projects updated after this date.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>timeMode</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>timelogs</p></li><li><p>estimated</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time calculation mode.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>searchTerm</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Search term to filter projects.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>reportType</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>project</p></li><li><p>health</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Type of report to generate.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>reportTimezone</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Timezone for the report.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>reportFormat</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>csv</p></li><li><p>html</p></li><li><p>pdf</p></li><li><p>xls</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Format for the report output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>projectType</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by project type.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>orderMode</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>asc</p></li><li><p>desc</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Sort order mode.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>orderBy</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>companyname</p></li><li><p>datecreated</p></li><li><p>duedate</p></li><li><p>lastactivity</p></li><li><p>name</p></li><li><p>namecaseinsensitive</p></li><li><p>ownercompany</p></li><li><p>starred</p></li><li><p>categoryname</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Field to sort by.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>notCompletedBefore</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter projects not completed before this date.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>minLastActivityDate</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Minimum last activity date filter.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>maxLastActivityDate</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Maximum last activity date filter.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>userId</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by user ID.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>page</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Page number to retrieve.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>pageSize</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Number of results per page.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>orderByCustomFieldId</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom field ID to sort percentage.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>useFormulaFields</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Use formula fields in output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the - [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- TEAMWORK:CLIENT_ERROR
- TEAMWORK:CONNECTIVITY
- TEAMWORK:FORBIDDEN
- TEAMWORK:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- TEAMWORK:NOT_FOUND
- TEAMWORK:SECURITY
- TEAMWORK:SERVER_ERROR
- TEAMWORK:TIMEOUT
- TEAMWORK:UNAUTHORIZED

## getProjectTasklists

`<teamwork:get-project-tasklists>`

Retrieves task lists for a project from Teamwork.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>projectId</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID of the project to retrieve task lists for.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>updatedAfter</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter task lists updated after this date.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>searchTerm</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Search term to filter task lists.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>projectType</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by project type.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>orderMode</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>asc</p></li><li><p>desc</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Sort order mode.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>orderBy</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>displayorder</p></li><li><p>name</p></li><li><p>status</p></li><li><p>createdat</p></li><li><p>updatedat</p></li><li><p>project</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Field to sort by.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>projectBudgetId</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by project budget ID.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>pageSize</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Number of results per page.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>page</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Page number to retrieve.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>useFormulaFields</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Use formula fields in calculations.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>sortDefaultListFirst</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Sort default list first.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>sortActiveListsFirst</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Sort active lists first.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>skipCounts</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Skip count calculations.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>showPrivate</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Include private task lists.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>showDeleted</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Include deleted task lists.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>showCompleted</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Include completed task lists.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>isReportDownload</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Return results as a report download.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>includeArchivedProjects</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Include archived projects in results.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>getEmptyLists</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Include empty task lists.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>completedOnly</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Return only completed task lists.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>projectIds</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by project IDs.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>projectCompanyIds</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by project company IDs.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>include</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Fields to include in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>ids</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by specific task list IDs.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>fields[users]</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><p>User fields to include in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>fields[teams]</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Team fields to include in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>fields[tasks]</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Task fields to include in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>fields[tasklists]</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Task list fields to include in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>fields[tags]</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Tag fields to include in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>fields[projects]</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Project fields to include in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>fields[projectIntegrations]</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Project integration fields to include in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>fields[milestones]</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Milestone fields to include in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>fields[lockdowns]</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Lockdown fields to include in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>fields[companies]</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Company fields to include in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>fields[ProjectPermissions]</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Project permission fields to include in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>excludeIds</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Task list IDs to exclude.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- TEAMWORK:CLIENT_ERROR
- TEAMWORK:CONNECTIVITY
- TEAMWORK:FORBIDDEN
- TEAMWORK:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- TEAMWORK:NOT_FOUND
- TEAMWORK:SECURITY
- TEAMWORK:SERVER_ERROR
- TEAMWORK:TIMEOUT
- TEAMWORK:UNAUTHORIZED

## getProjects

`<teamwork:get-projects>`

Retrieves all projects from Teamwork.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>page</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Page number to retrieve.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>pageSize</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Number of results per page.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>updatedAfter</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter projects updated after this date.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>timeMode</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>timelogs</p></li><li><p>estimated</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Time calculation mode.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>searchTerm</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Search term to filter projects.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>reportType</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>project</p></li><li><p>health</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Type of report to generate.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>reportTimezone</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Timezone for the report.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>reportFormat</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>csv</p></li><li><p>html</p></li><li><p>pdf</p></li><li><p>xls</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Format for the report output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>projectType</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by project type.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>orderMode</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>asc</p></li><li><p>desc</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Sort order mode.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>orderBy</p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>companyname</p></li><li><p>datecreated</p></li><li><p>duedate</p></li><li><p>lastactivity</p></li><li><p>name</p></li><li><p>namecaseinsensitive</p></li><li><p>ownercompany</p></li><li><p>starred</p></li><li><p>categoryname</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><p>Field to sort by.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>notCompletedBefore</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter projects not completed before this date.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>minLastActivityDate</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Minimum last activity date filter.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>maxLastActivityDate</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Maximum last activity date filter.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>userId</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by user ID.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>orderByCustomFieldId</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom field ID to sort by.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>minBudgetCapacityUsedPercent</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Minimum budget capacity used percentage.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>maxBudgetCapacityUsedPercent</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Maximum budget capacity used percentage.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>useFormulaFields</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Use formula fields in calculations.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>skipCounts</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Skip count calculations.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>searchCompanies</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Include companies in search.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>searchByLetter</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Search by first letter.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>onlyStarredProjects</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Return only starred projects.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>onlyProjectsWithExplicitMembership</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Return only projects with explicit results.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>includeSubCategories</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Include subcategories in projects.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>alwaysIncludeFiltering</p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><p>Always include filtering.</p></td><td><p>false</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>usersWithExplicitMembershipIds</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by user IDs with explicit membership.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>teamIds</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by team IDs.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>selectedColumns</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Columns to include in the IDs.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>projectIds</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by project IDs.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>projectHealths</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by project health levels.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>projectCompanyIds</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by project company IDs.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>projectCategoryIds</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Filter by project category IDs.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>includeCustomFieldIds</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Custom field IDs to include.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>include</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Fields to include in the response.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>featuresEnabled</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Enabled features to filter by.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>excludeTagIds</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Tag IDs to exclude.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>excludeProjectIds</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>Project IDs to exclude.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- TEAMWORK:CLIENT_ERROR
- TEAMWORK:CONNECTIVITY
- TEAMWORK:FORBIDDEN
- TEAMWORK:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- TEAMWORK:SECURITY
- TEAMWORK:SERVER_ERROR
- TEAMWORK:TIMEOUT
- TEAMWORK:UNAUTHORIZED

## getTasklistById

`<teamwork:get-tasklist-by-id>`

Retrieves a task list by ID from Teamwork.

### Parameters

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p>Configuration</p></td><td><p>String</p></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>tasklistId</p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><p>ID of the task list to retrieve.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Config Ref</p></td><td><div><div><p>ConfigurationProvider</p></div></div></td><td><p>The name of the configuration to use to execute this component.</p></td><td></td><td><p>x</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Variable</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>Name of the variable that stores the operationâs output.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Target Value</p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><p>An expression to evaluate against the operationâs output and store the expression outcome in the target variable.</p></td><td><p>#[payload]</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>Error Mappings</p></td><td><div><div><p>Array of <a href="#ErrorMapping">Error Mapping</a></p></div></div></td><td><p>Set of error mappings.</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Output

<table><colgroup><col> <col></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p>Type</p></td><td><p>Any</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>Attributes Type</p></td><td><div><div><p>Any</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### For Configurations

- [Config](#Config)

### Throws

- TEAMWORK:CLIENT_ERROR
- TEAMWORK:CONNECTIVITY
- TEAMWORK:FORBIDDEN
- TEAMWORK:INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR
- TEAMWORK:NOT_FOUND
- TEAMWORK:SECURITY
- TEAMWORK:SERVER_ERROR
- TEAMWORK:TIMEOUT
- TEAMWORK:UNAUTHORIZED

## Types

### TLS

Configures TLS to provide secure communications for the Mule app.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Enabled Protocols</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A comma-separated list of protocols enabled for this context.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Enabled Cipher Suites</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A comma-separated list of cipher suites enabled for this context.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Trust Store</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#TrustStore">Truststore</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Configures the TLS truststore.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Key Store</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p><a href="#KeyStore">Keystore</a></p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Configures the TLS keystore.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Revocation Check</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#StandardRevocationCheck">Standard Revocation Check</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#CustomOcspResponder">Custom OCSP Responder</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#CrlFile">CRL File</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Configures a revocation checking mechanism.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Truststore

Configures the truststore for TLS.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Path</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The location (which will be resolved relative to the current classpath and file system, if possible) of the trust store.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Password</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The password used to protect the trust store.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The type of store used.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Algorithm</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The algorithm used by the trust store.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Insecure</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>If true, no certificate validations will be performed, rendering connections vulnerable to attacks. Use at your own risk.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Keystore

Configures the keystore for the TLS protocol. The keystore you generate contains a private key and a
public certificate.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Path</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The location (which will be resolved relative to the current classpath and file system, if possible) of the key store.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Type</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The type of store used.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Alias</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>When the key store contains many private keys, this attribute indicates the alias of the key that should be used. If not defined, the first key in the file will be used by default.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Key Password</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The password used to protect the private key.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Password</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The password used to protect the key store.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Algorithm</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The algorithm used by the key store.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Standard Revocation Check

Configures standard revocation checks for TLS certificates.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Only End Entities</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Which elements to verify in the certificate chain:</p></div><div><ul><li><p><code>true</code></p></li></ul></div><div><p>Verify only the last element in the certificate chain.</p></div><div><ul><li><p><code>false</code></p></li></ul></div><div><p>Verify all elements in the certificate chain.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Prefer Crls</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>How to check certificate validity:</p></div><div><ul><li><p><code>true</code></p></li></ul></div><div><p>Check the Certification Revocation List (CRL) for certificate validity.</p></div><div><ul><li><p><code>false</code></p></li></ul></div><div><p>Use the Online Certificate Status Protocol (OCSP) to check certificate validity.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>No Fallback</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Whether to use the secondary method to check certificate validity:</p></div><div><ul><li><p><code>true</code></p></li></ul></div><div><p>Use the method that wasnât specified in the <strong>Prefer Crls</strong> field (the secondary method) to check certificate validity.</p></div><div><ul><li><p><code>false</code></p></li></ul></div><div><p>Do not use the secondary method to check certificate validity.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Soft Fail</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>What to do if the revocation server canât be reached or is busy:</p></div><div><ul><li><p><code>true</code></p></li></ul></div><div><p>Avoid verification failure.</p></div><div><ul><li><p><code>false</code></p></li></ul></div><div><p>Allow the verification to fail.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Custom OCSP Responder

Configures a custom OCSP responder for certification revocation checks.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Url</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The URL of the OCSP responder.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Cert Alias</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Alias of the signing certificate for the OCSP response. If specified, the alias must be in the truststore.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### CRL File

Specifies the location of the certification revocation list (CRL) file.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Path</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The path to the CRL file.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Reconnection

Configures a reconnection strategy for an operation.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Fails Deployment</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>When the application is deployed, a connectivity test is performed on all connectors. If set to true, deployment fails if the test doesnât pass after exhausting the associated reconnection strategy.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Reconnection Strategy</strong></p></td><td><div><div><ul><li><p><a href="#reconnect">Reconnect</a></p></li><li><p><a href="#ReconnectForever">Reconnect Forever</a></p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>The reconnection strategy to use.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Reconnect

Configures a standard reconnection strategy, which specifies how often to reconnect and how many
reconnection attempts the connector source or operation can make.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Frequency</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>How often in milliseconds to reconnect.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Blocking</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>If <code>false</code>, the reconnection strategy runs in a separate, non-blocking thread.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Count</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>How many reconnection attempts the Mule app can make.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Reconnect Forever

Configures a forever reconnection strategy by which the connector source or operation attempts to
reconnect at a specified frequency for as long as the Mule app runs.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Frequency</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>How often in milliseconds to reconnect.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Blocking</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Boolean</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>If <code>false</code>, the reconnection strategy runs in a separate, non-blocking thread.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Expiration Policy

Configures an expiration policy strategy.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Max Idle Time</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Number</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>A scalar time value for the maximum amount of time a dynamic configuration instance should be allowed to be idle before itâs considered eligible for expiration.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Time Unit</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>NANOSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MICROSECONDS</p></li><li><p>MILLISECONDS</p></li><li><p>SECONDS</p></li><li><p>MINUTES</p></li><li><p>HOURS</p></li><li><p>DAYS</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Time unit for the <strong>Max Idle Time</strong> field.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>

### Error Mapping

Configures error mappings for the connector operations.

<table><colgroup><col> <col> <col> <col> <col></colgroup><thead><tr><th>Field</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th><th>Default Value</th><th>Required</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><p><strong>Source</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>Enumeration, one of:</p></div><div><ul><li><p>ANY</p></li><li><p>REDELIVERY_EXHAUSTED</p></li><li><p>TRANSFORMATION</p></li><li><p>EXPRESSION</p></li><li><p>SECURITY</p></li><li><p>CLIENT_SECURITY</p></li><li><p>SERVER_SECURITY</p></li><li><p>ROUTING</p></li><li><p>CONNECTIVITY</p></li><li><p>RETRY_EXHAUSTED</p></li><li><p>TIMEOUT</p></li></ul></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Source of the error.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div></div></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Target</strong></p></td><td><div><div><p>String</p></div></div></td><td><div><div><p>Target of the error.</p></div></div></td><td><div></div></td><td><div><div><p>x</p></div></div></td></tr></tbody></table>
